description: Cloudsmith is a cloud-hosted artifact management and software supply chain platform for storing, securing, and distributing software packages across many package formats. It provides repositories, access control, automation, and distribution features for development and release workflows.
summary: Cloudsmith exposes a REST API at `https://api.cloudsmith.io/`, a Python-based `cloudsmith` CLI, and documentation for an MCP server; no GraphQL surface was found.
